request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a strike from "ATAC". IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), 2-letter for provinces (e.g., "MI" for Milan), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGION", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: Sciopero del trasporto pubblico, adesione personale Atac al 20,9% - Roma Servizi per la Mobilità

Sciopero del trasporto pubblico, adesione personale Atac al 20,9%

Pubblicato il: 29/03/2022 - Aggiornato il: 25/01/2023

L’adesione del personale Atac allo sciopero del trasporto pubblico, rilevata in mattinata, è stata pari al 20,9%

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the Strike Indicator**

Okay, my primary goal here is to figure out if this text signifies an *upcoming* strike. The input is "Sciopero del trasporto pubblico, adesione personale Atac al 20,9%." That seems like a pretty clear statement about the *participation* percentage. Specifically, it states "L’adesione del personale Atac allo sciopero del trasporto pubblico, rilevata in mattinata, è stata pari al 20,9%" which translates to something like, "The participation of Atac personnel in the public transport strike, detected this morning, was 20.9%".

My immediate evaluation is that this is *not* an announcement of a future strike. The text describes an observed participation rate. The phrase "rilevata in mattinata" (detected this morning) strongly suggests this event is either currently happening or has already happened. The word "adesione" (participation/adhesion) also leads me to this conclusion. I have been instructed to set `isStrike` to false if the input only provides participation data about a strike that has already taken place.

Therefore, after reviewing the text, I set the `isStrike` variable to `false`. My conclusion is that this is just reporting on an event.
